mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userpick_movie VALUES ( userpick_movie_seq.NEXTVAL, #{simpleReviewTmdbMovieId}, 1, SYSDATE, #{moviePosterPath}, #{movieTitle}, #{movieReleaseDate}, #{movieRuntime}, 0 )

INSERT INTO userpick_movie VALUES ( userpick_movie_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardReviewTmdbMovieId}, 1, SYSDATE, #{moviePosterPath}, #{movieTitle},
TO_DATE(#{movieReleaseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{movieRuntime}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_status = 1 AND userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, b.* from ( (select USERPICK_MOVIE_NO, USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS, USERPICK_MOVIE_DATE, USERPICK_MOVIE_POSTER_PATH, USERPICK_MOVIE_TITLE, USERPICK_MOVIE_RELEASE_DATE, USERPICK_MOVIE_RUNTIME, USERPICK_MOVIE_VIEW_COUNT from userpick_movie where userpick_movie_status = 1 and userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by userpick_movie_no desc)b ) )where rnum between #{pageInfo.start} and #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO) FROM userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO WHERE um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 AND ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId}

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, b.* from ( (select DISTINCT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_DATE, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_POSTER_PATH, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TITLE, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_RELEASE_DATE, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_RUNTIME, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_VIEW_COUNT from userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO where um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 and ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId} order by um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO desc)b ) )where rnum between #{pageInfo.start} and #{pageInfo.end}
